auth.have_account: Already have an account? Sign In
auth.join_ngo_req: No active memberships. Request to join an organization.

goals.title: Goals
goals.description: Describe what needs to be accomplished

landing.title: Organize • Engage • Impact
landing.tagline: The multi-tenant SaaS workspace for public and civic organizations. Seamlessly coordinate members, trace financial ledger items, report impact, and raise donations.
landing.capabilities_desc: Equip your community team with enterprise-grade coordination tools tailored for local execution.
landing.card1_desc: Launch a white-labeled custom site instantly (/@slug) complete with active programs, goals trackbar, public news briefs, and certified wall of donors.
landing.card2_desc: Accept local MTN MoMo and Airtel payments smoothly. Allow supporters to submit instant payment proofs directly to your workspace administration.
landing.card3_desc: Register local cooperatives or field offices. Log members, organize groups, track attendance with custom QR codes, and run transparent assemblies.
landing.directory_desc: Explore official public organizations, community cooperatives, and development initiatives operating transparently across the region.
landing.search_placeholder: Search workspaces by name, category, or mission...
landing.pricing_desc: Support transparent community administration. Select a tier packed with powerful tools tailored to your operational scale.
landing.faq_desc: Everything you need to know about setting up, auditing, and administering your organization workspace on Impacto.
landing.contact_box_title: Still have questions about Impacto workspace configurations?
landing.contact_box_desc: Contact our digital solutions desk in Kigali. We can assist your Social Cooperative or Initiative with custom dashboards, priority data migrations, or local billing protocols.
landing.footer_desc: Have questions regarding registration of a verified workspace account?

dashboard_labels.welcome_subtitle: Welcome back to your branded organization workspace dashboard on Impacto.
dashboard_labels.credential_desc: To participate in community votes and access audited grants, upload a clear scan of your National ID or Cooperatives Certificate.
dashboard_labels.resignation_desc: If you wish to formally depart the cooperative bylaws and resign all voting/financial shares, log an exit survey to update administration files.
dashboard_labels.announcements_subtitle: Publish a news brief, volunteer campaign call, or administrative notice to all verified members.
dashboard_labels.no_messages: No messages yet in this channel. Send the first message!
dashboard_labels.member_bylaws_warning: Under organization bylaws, a member profile must be created first before attributing a pledge record.
dashboard_labels.guidelines_limits_desc: Supports PDF, XLSX, DOCX, Images up to 15MB
dashboard_labels.drag_drop_browse: Drag & Drop files here, or Click to Browse
dashboard_labels.drag_drop_guideline_desc: Drag and drop resource guidelines to persist documents for all members.
dashboard_labels.volunteer_ledger_subtitle: Add, track and manage volunteer participation with an accurate ledger.
dashboard_labels.cooperative_support_survey_question: What can the organization do to support other volunteers better?
dashboard_labels.scan_qr_desc: Participants scan this QR screen on mobile to login instant presence. Or, run a manual check-in:
dashboard_labels.select_event_qr_desc: Select an event and click "Generate QR Code" to launch verification gateway.
dashboard_labels.examine_deposit_slips_desc: Examine uploaded screenshot deposit slips, dial MTN/Airtel logs, and confirm ledger flows.
dashboard_labels.log_work_hours: Log work hours and assignment details
dashboard_labels.verification_desc_vol: Verify your identity documentations to confirm operational credentials and unlock secure financial disbursements inside the organization.
dashboard_labels.leave_cooperative_desc: Need to leave the cooperative group? Provide qualitative reasons for research audit, exit schedules, and process checkout steps.
dashboard_labels.go_to_goals_msg: Go to Goals tab and toggle pin indicator on goals you want to lock on dashboard.
dashboard_labels.no_announcements_shared: No announcements have been shared in this workspace yet.
dashboard_labels.no_upcoming_calendar: There are no upcoming calendar invites.
dashboard_labels.drag_drop_passport_pdf: Drag & Drop passport PDF photo here
dashboard_labels.pdf_jpg_png_limit: PDF, JPG, PNG up to 10MB sizes.
dashboard_labels.support_volunteers_better: What can the organization do to support other volunteers better?
dashboard_labels.news_feed_subtitle: Announcements, restructures, and public logs in this organization.
dashboard_labels.no_news_message: Write your first community announcement post by clicking the button above.
dashboard_labels.headline_placeholder: e.g. Major Soil Testing Equipment Purchase
dashboard_labels.events_board_subtitle: Verify community workshops, schedule new sessions, and download QR codes.
dashboard_labels.create_session_msg: Create a session or community event above to sync calendar workflows.
dashboard_labels.select_event_generate_qr_msg: Select an event and click "Generate QR Code" to launch verification gateway.
dashboard_labels.brief_description_placeholder: What are the key goals and expectations?
dashboard_labels.publish_public_portal: Publish on public portal profile page
